headline: It’s Now a Supply-Shock World. A BlackRock Leader Explains How to Invest for It.
summary: A key investing theme this decade is increasingly severe supply chain and energy shocks, says Mike Pyle, the deputy head of BlackRock’s portfolio management group.

raw.headline: It’s Now a Supply-Shock World. A BlackRock Leader Explains How to Invest for It.

headline: Bitcoin's Recent Rebound Was Driven By Futures Trading, Not New Coin Appreciation, Experts Say
summary: Bitcoin's rebound in April was fuelled by leveraged futures trading, data analysts said, as spot market demand and ETF investment flows remained weak. A rise of 12.7% was Bitcoin's largest monthly gain since April 2025, but stubborn inflation figures have...
